name: greek-electricity-toolkit
description: Read Greek electricity bills (ΔΕΗ/ΗΡΩΝ/Protergia/…), compute the true effective €/kWh behind the headline (the Διακύμανση/ρήτρα trap), separate the one charge you control from the regulated pass-throughs, and rank provider offers by commitment tier — with a backtest engine and a seasonal annual comparator.
